title: talisia clathrata subsp. canescens
intro: Talisia clathrata subsp. canescens, also known as the canescens subspecies of the Talisia clathrata plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Talisia clathrata subsp. canescens include its potential to aid in the treatment of various health conditions, such as fever, coughs, and skin infections, as well as its ability to act as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are often used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
